message:
test(core): add property-based tests for model-checking harness

8 proptests covering ModelChecker state exploration increments,
counterexample count monotonicity, reset clearing, verdict when
all-ok, violated predicates uniqueness, plus serde roundtrips
for degradation/strategy/verdict types. (ft-2p9cb.5.2.3)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
